vulnerability.reference: Adversarial prompts can reverse concept erasure, restoring harmful content generation capabilities.
vulnerability.generated: Approximate unlearning leaves residual harmful knowledge in the model, enabling adversarial prompts to retrieve forbidden content.

impact.reference: Exposure of users to prohibited content (hate speech, violence) causes psychological harm.
impact.generated: Users encounter harmful content meant to be erased, causing psychological harm and eroding trust in content moderation safeguards.

dose_response.reference: Adversarial prompts enable recovery of unlearned harmful content, which in content moderation concept erasure exposes users to forbidden material, leading to psychological harm and regulatory sanctions.
dose_response.generated: Adversarial prompts recovering residual knowledge after approximate unlearning, through user exposure to forbidden generated content, trigger retrieval of harmful knowledge, leading to psychological harm and eroded trust in content moderation.
